title: DocMod
description: The mod is a adventure, more dimension, item, block, decorational, space, and functionality mod ! It add also blocks (decorational and functional or wip) content from the UK Show "Doctor Who"
body:
DocMod
--------------------

## NEWS!
DocMod is now availaible for Minecraft 1.19.3!
 
# About:
The mod is a mod who add dimension, item like weapons utility armor sonic screwdriver from the UK Show Doctor Who, block like decorational block ore and soon tardis!, The server from our community with our mods installed, but also add a bit of magic! With a Magical wand that can be used as a weapon! (More coming soon later! 😎) 
Somes decorational block from the UK show "Doctor Who"! And will be soon functional!
This mod is create by 9e_Docteur, fonder of DocTeam
But it's not the end, you can find structures in the Dungeons Update!
This mod have also utility blocks/items, even mobs who come from the UK TV show Doctor Who like daleks, cyberman!

Note before download : For somes screen content like server from our community, our server or DocTeam Staff's Screen, this mod need to connect to our API for player's DocTeam capes textures, DocTeam (our group) informations, and a Minecraft API to get textures of for your player's skin, name and our server to fetch who and how many player are online on our player, and max slots.

 
 
Issues:
> https://github.com/9e-Docteur/DocMod/issues/

## Recommended Mods:

 JEI:  For Crafts.
 GeckoLib : To run DocMod 1.16.5
 
##Information:

You can use this mod for a server, a modpack, a survival, etc...

Please use creative mod for the DocMod BETA

Note : For somes version, you can play DocMod Beta in survival mod, but it's not recommended

Somes item in the features is currently working on and can be not on the mod if we working on.
